name.hint: An optional name to help identify the light source.
name.label: Name

name.hint: An optional name to help identify the sound.
name.label: Name

APPLICATION.NavigateBackConfirm: Are you sure you want to exit the Foundry Virtual Tabletop game?

effects.hint: The effects that are applied to Tokens within the Region.
effects.label: Effects

changeLevel.Confirm: Do you want to move {token} to {level}?
changeLevel.ConfirmSelect: Select the level you want to move {token} to.

exposure.hint: Partially reveal the visible area of this elevated surface to observers below and outside of it. The revealed area depends on the angle between the observer and the surface boundary, this area decreases as the angle becomes steeper. This option is useful for roofs, balconies, or other overhead platforms.
exposure.label: Reveal Elevated Surface

occlusion.hint: When an occludable Token is beneath the surface, Tiles with occlusion mode set to Surface, and any foreground or background Level textures at the same elevation or higher, will be occluded.
occlusion.label: Occlusion

teleportToken.ConfirmRevealed: Do you want to teleport {token} to {region} in {scene}?
teleportToken.ConfirmSelectDifferentScene: Select the destination you want to teleport {token} to.
teleportToken.ConfirmSelectSameScene: Select the destination in {scene} you want to teleport {token} to.

destinations.hint: The destination Region(s) the Token is teleported to once it is moved into this Region. If multiple destination Regions are configured, one of them is randomly selected unless a choice is allowed and either this teleporter is revealed or the User that moved the Token is a GM.
destinations.label: Destinations

revealed.hint: The text that is displayed in the confirmation dialog if the destination(s) are revealed or the User is a GM. {token} is replaced by the Token's name. {region} is replaced by the destination Region's name unless this teleporter has multiple destinations. {scene} is replaced by the destination Scene's name unless this teleporter has destinations in different Scenes.
revealed.label: Dialog (Revealed)

unrevealed.hint: The text that is displayed in the confirmation dialog if the destination(s) are unrevealed and the User is not a GM. {token} is replaced by the Token's name.
unrevealed.label: Dialog (Unrevealed)

placement.hint: Choose the placement of the Token inside the destination Region.
placement.label: Placement

revealed.hint: Reveal the destination(s) of this teleporter to anyone.
revealed.label: Revealed

snap.hint: Snap the destination position the Token is teleported to.
snap.label: Snap

duration.hint: The duration of the transition animation in milliseconds.
duration.label: Transition Duration

type.hint: The type of transition animation that is played when a Token is teleported.
type.label: Transition Type

COMBATANT.WarnNonVisibleToken: This Combatant is not visible to you.

CONTROLS.ClearAllOwnedHint: Permanently delete all viewed {type} objects that you own?
CONTROLS.RegionTemplateModeP: When enabled, the palette is ignored and each shape you draw creates a new Region. Shapes cannot be added to existing Regions.
CONTROLS.WallDoorBlocks: Movement, vision, and hearing unless opened

levels.hint: Choose the Levels in which inclusion applies. An empty selection applies inclusion to all Levels.
levels.label: Levels

DOCUMENT.ReplaceWarning: There is already a Document {link} with ID {id} in this collection. Do you wish to replace it or create a copy?

bezierFactor.hint: For freehand drawing, the smoothing factor controls the amount of spline smoothing.
bezierFactor.label: Smoothing Factor

interface.hint: A Drawing that represents an "Object" is rendered in the Primary Canvas Group and is affected by lighting and fog of war exploration. One that conveys "Information" is rendered in the Interface Group and is visible to all players unless hidden.
interface.label: Drawing Role

name.hint: An optional name to help identify the drawing.
name.label: Name

initial.hint: After base-data attributes are initialized, but before derived data is prepared
initial.label: Initial

DURATION.Label: Duration
DURATION.MaxOneWarning: A duration in {units} will be treated as having a value of no greater than one.

phase.hint: The point in data preparation or another event a change is to be applied.
phase.label: Phase

showIcon.hint: Should the icon representing this Effect be displayed in the UI while this effect is active?
showIcon.label: Show Icon?

TAGS.ErrorInvalidGridOffset2D: A 2D grid offset must have two integer coordinates, which are separated by a dot.
TAGS.ErrorInvalidGridOffset3D: A 3D grid offset must have three integer coordinates, which are separated by dots.

DETACHED.PopupBlocked: Unable to detach Application. You may have a popup-blocker active.
DETACHED.TimedOut: Operation timed out when detaching Application window. You may have a popup-blocker active.

HOTBAR.ClearConfirm: Clear all assigned Macros from your hotbar?
HOTBAR.Label: Action Bar

HUD.ToFrontOrBack: Bring to Front / Send to Back

JOIN.WorldPendingSetup: This World is not ready yet. Please wait for the Gamemaster to log in and complete setup before attempting to join.

PERMISSION.RegionCreateHint: Allow users with this role to create regions.

token.hint: The Token the Region is attached to. When this Token is moved, the Region is moved with it.
token.label: Attached Token

displayMeasurements.hint: Configure whether to display measurements for the Region.
displayMeasurements.label: Display Measurements

highlightMode.hint: Configure whether to highlight the true shapes or the grid spaces covered by the Region.
highlightMode.label: Highlight Mode

enabled.hint: Configure whether the shapes of this Region are constrained by walls.
enabled.label: Is Restricted

NOTIFICATIONS.PastedShapeWithoutControlledRegion: You are not controlling a Region that the shape can be pasted into.
NOTIFICATIONS.PlacedRegionNotAttachedToToken: The placed Region must be attached to a Token.
NOTIFICATIONS.PlacedRegionRotationNotAllowed: You are not allowed to rotate the shape of the placed Region.

darkness.label: Darkness-blocking Walls and Light Sources with Priority > Threshold

light.label: Light-blocking Walls and Darkness Sources with Priority ≥ Threshold

sight.label: Sight-blocking Walls and Darkness Sources with Priority ≥ Threshold

TOOLTIPS.CannotChangeLevelsIfAttached: The Region must be on the same Level as the Token it's attached to.
TOOLTIPS.CannotEnableRestriction: This Region can't be restricted because it's included in more than one Level.
TOOLTIPS.CannotSelectMultipleLevelsIfRestricted: This Region can't be included in multiple Levels while it's restricted.

LAYER_UNLOCKED.label: Only on Region Layer when unlocked

Environment.DarkHint: Behaves as the base environmental settings, but applies as the scene's darkness level gets closer to 1.

mode.hint: Controls Fog of War mode: "None" disables exploration (tokens only see what they currently can), "Individual" tracks exploration separately for each user, and "Shared" uses a single exploration state contributed to by all users.
mode.label: Exploration Mode

distance.hint: The distance each grid space represents on this scene, in units appropriate to the game system.

initialLevel.hint: If a User has visibility of this Level, they will be placed on it when the Scene is activated for the first time, or if the Scene is active when joining the game.
initialLevel.label: Initial Level

shiftX.hint: The offset applied to the Scene's playable area, which is centered on the canvas by default.
shiftX.label: X-Shift

activeOnly.hint: Play this transition animation only when the Scene is activated or when it is active after joining the game.
activeOnly.label: Active Only

duration.hint: The duration of the transition animation in milliseconds.
duration.label: Duration

type.hint: The type of transition animation that is played when the Scene is viewed.
type.label: Transition Type

SCENE.FogModeChangeMessage: Fog exploration mode has changed. This will reload fog exploration and reset vision.
SCENE.GridAppearanceHint: Configure the appearance of the grid lines.
SCENE.InheritedField: This field's value is being inherited from the '{level}' level. Click here to edit it directly.

Add.hint: Scenes support more than one vertical level. Add a new level to convert this scene into a multi-level scene.
Add.label: Add Level

alphaThreshold.hint: Pixels in the background texture with alpha values below this threshold do not restrict light or weather.
alphaThreshold.label: Alpha Threshold

levels.hint: Configure the set of other Levels which are fully or partially visible from this one.
levels.label: Visible Levels

unixSocket.hint: Instead of a port number, a file path to a Unix domain socket can be entered. If both a port and socket are entered, the socket path will be used.
unixSocket.label: Unix Socket

SETUP.PackageUpdateCoreUnknown: An update is available for {title} but it may not be installed because it requires unknown core software version {vmin}.
SETUP.QuickstartFailure: Quick-Start of module '{title}' failed: {message}. See the console (F12) for more details.
SETUP.WorldCancelConfirm: If you return to setup now, you will lose any changes you have made here.
SETUP.WorldCreateDependencyFail: The World could not be created as required dependencies were not installed.
SETUP.WorldCreateNoSystem: You must select a Game System for the World before continuing.
SETUP.WorldCreateNoTitle: You must provide a title for the World before continuing.

NOTIFICATIONS.ControlWalls: Control a group of Walls which define the boundary of your desired shape.
NOTIFICATIONS.DrawingMultipleObjectsControlled: You must control or configure only one or no {type} when you draw a shape!
NOTIFICATIONS.EmptyEnclosedArea: The area enclosed by the controlled Walls is empty! Make sure that the outer Walls form a closed loop and are connected endpoint to endpoint.
NOTIFICATIONS.NoControlledWalls: You are not controlling any Walls!

gridBased.hint: A grid-based shape follows the grid's distance rules, as defined by the Grid Diagonals game setting.
gridBased.label: Is Grid-Based

name.hint: An optional name to help identify the Tile.
name.label: Name

alphaThreshold.hint: Pixels in the Tile image with alpha values below this threshold do not restrict light or weather and do not trigger hover fading.
alphaThreshold.label: Alpha Threshold

TOKEN.DeleteAttachedRegionWarning: You are deleting a Token that has a Region attached to it. Its attached Region(s) will be permanently deleted.

PLAN.DirectViolation: You are not allowed to place waypoints while planning this movement.
PLAN.MaxCostViolation: The planned movement path exceeds the maximum allowed cost.
PLAN.MaxDistanceViolation: The planned movement path exceeds the maximum allowed distance.
PLAN.MinCostViolation: The planned movement path does not meet the minimum required cost.
PLAN.MinDistanceViolation: The planned movement path does not meet the minimum required distance.

NOTIFICATIONS.PlacedTokenRotationNotAllowed: You are not allowed to rotate the placed Token.

PROTOTYPE.OverridesWarning: This field is defined by Prototype Token Overrides and cannot be edited directly.

RegionBehavior.adjustDarknessLevel: Override, brighten, or darken the Scene's Darkness Level within the Region.
RegionBehavior.applyActiveEffect: Apply Active Effects to Tokens while they are within the Region.
RegionBehavior.changeLevel: Allow Tokens that move into the Region to move to another Level the Region is included in.
RegionBehavior.defineSurface: Define a surface that can restrict light, movement, sight, and sound.
RegionBehavior.displayScrollingText: Display a scrolling text above a Token when it triggers one of the subscribed events.
RegionBehavior.executeMacro: Execute a Macro when one of the subscribed events occurs.
RegionBehavior.executeScript: Execute a script when one of the subscribed events occurs.
RegionBehavior.modifyMovementCost: Modify the movement cost of Tokens within the Region.
RegionBehavior.pauseGame: Pause the game when a Token is moved into the Region by a player.
RegionBehavior.suppressWeather: Suppress weather effects within the Region.
RegionBehavior.teleportToken: Teleport Tokens that are moved into the Region to another Region.
RegionBehavior.toggleBehavior: Enable/disable other Region Behaviors when one of the subscribed events occurs.

USERS.LoginAsGMRequired: You must be a Gamemaster to log in as another user.
USERS.PasswordWarning: Setting a password for the Gamemaster account is strongly recommended.
